# Understanding Error Codes (Zscaler Client Connector API)

**Source:** https://help.zscaler.com/legacy-apis/about-error-codes
**Captured:** 2026-04-26 via Playwright MCP (snapshot extraction).

---

The following table lists the HTTP status codes returned by the Zscaler Client Connector API:

| Code | Description |
|---|---|
| 200 | Successful |
| 400 | Bad Request |
| 401 | Unauthorized |
| 403 | Forbidden |
| 404 | Not Found |
| 415 | Unsupported Media Type |
| 429 | Too Many Requests — The user has sent too many requests in a given amount of time and exceeded the rate limit or device threshold. |
| 500 | Not Implemented |
